description: Configure Wazuh File Integrity Monitoring (FIM) to monitor the directory '/opt/secure_configs' in realtime for permission changes. Implement a custom detection rule in 'local_rules.xml' with Rule ID 110001, Level 12, and Parent Rule 550, using the description 'Critical: File became world-writable in secure directory'. The rule must trigger only when a file in '/opt/secure_configs' becomes world-writable (permissions ending in 'w.'). Ensure the configuration is active and verified by triggering an alert for a file in the target directory with 777 permissions.
